name: mails-bridge
description: Connect all your email inboxes to Codex — Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, iCloud, or any email provider that supports IMAP/SMTP. Add unlimited accounts, and Codex auto-detects the server settings from your email address. Setup takes 2 minutes: generate an App Password, share it with Codex, done. Search across inboxes, read and reply to messages, draft emails, organize with folders and stars — all from your terminal. Works great for CI/CD digests, deploy notifications, job search tracking, and batch inbox workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Connect any email inbox to Codex
